user.title: Ternopil Grid Schedule
user.description: Choose a street from the searchable list and optionally enter a house number.

street.title: Change street
street.description: Choose a new street from the searchable list and optionally update the house number.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics & logging
diagnostics.description: Enable verbose ternopil_grid debug logging when you need live troubleshooting.

ping.title: Probe behavior
ping.description: Configure whether the live power probe is enabled, how it checks for power, and how often it runs.

ping_entity.title: Device probe target
ping_entity.description: Choose the Home Assistant device or entity that should be used as the live power probe target.

ping_manual.title: Manual IP target
ping_manual.description: Enter the IP address used as the live power probe target.

error.invalid_target_source: Entity status method requires a probe device/entity target.
